description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a low stone wall enclosing a landscaped yard. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored stone or concrete, and the house features large windows and sliding glass doors that open onto the garden areas. The front yard includes a paved driveway and walkway, with patches of grass and decorative shrubs or small trees. The rear of the house opens onto a larger green space, with additional landscaping and privacy provided by the perimeter wall. The roof is flat and likely accessible only for maintenance, with no visible overhangs or decorative elements. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, light stone exterior, large windows, and landscaped yard enclosed by a low wall. The design features clean lines and open spaces connecting indoor and outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, driveway, and landscaped front yard with shrubs and a low stone wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat roof, stone exterior, and a mix of windows and solid wall sections.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the larger backyard, additional windows, and a secondary entry or patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more greenery, a flat roof, and the continuation of the stone wall and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a simple door, paved approach, and minimal overhang, integrated into the stone wall and landscaping.
